description_zh: 局部脱毛/秃斑,可能是过敏或皮肤病
description_en: Patchy hair loss / bald spots — possible allergy or skin issue

expectations.rationale: patchy fur loss → fur score significantly low

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须区分秃斑与打结(这是脱毛,不是毛打结)
应该把过敏(已知问题)+ 抓挠(diary)+ 秃斑(照片)三条线索连起来
应该建议兽医做皮肤/过敏检查
qualitative_criteria_en: Must distinguish bald spots from matting (this is hair loss, not knots)
Should connect the three signals: known allergies + scratching diary + visible patches
